description: Use this API to reset PSSE to an increased bus size level. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = new_dimension(buses)

parameters.name: buses
parameters.description: Maximum number of buses allowed at the new size level if buses is less than the current maximum number of buses, psse’s capacity limits are not changed. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
Unable to change network to new bus size. PSSE Xplore is limited to 50 buses.
